revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Game | Name=Oh, Deer! | Guid=3030-57895 | Deck="Oh, Deer!" is a game about drifting through turns and hitting (or not hitting) as many deer as possible while driving to grandma's house. | ReleaseDate=2015-06-12 | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Blood,Concepts/Deer,Concepts/Deliberately_Retro,Concepts/Digital_Distribution,Concepts/Humble_Bundle,Concepts/Indie,Concepts/PlayStation_Mobile,Concepts/Pre_Release_Public_Testing | Developers=Companies/Necrosoft_Games | Franchises= | Genres=Genres/Driving_Racing | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Car | Platforms=Platforms/PC,Platforms/PlayStation_Network_Vita | Publishers=Companies/Humble_Original,Companies/Necrosoft_Games | Games= | Themes= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/10/103881/2917059-oh%2C%20deer%21%20logo.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"2917059-oh, deer! logo.png","path":"10\/103881\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_small,square_medium,scale_avatar,square_mini,scale_super,scale_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_large,square_tiny,screen_medium,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick","caption":"Oh, Deer! Logo"},"background":[]}' />
==Overview== Oh, Deer! is a driving game developed by Necrosoft Games and published by Humble Original (PC version), and Necrosoft Games (original PlayStation Mobile version) for Vita and PC.
Oh, Deer! was the last game released for [[Concepts/PlayStation_Mobile|PlayStation Mobile]]. The game was released in an alpha state for the PlayStation Mobile version. The beta PC version made its debut as a part of the February 2017 Humble Monthly Bundle.

{{Game |Guid=3696b737-17ec-4c54-b0ed-90d299bcfd90 |Name=Oh, My Doug! |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--tyjrtyf-06-09-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--xzcvzxcvsdfa-06-09-2026.jpg |Deck=A search action game with a 90s animation style similar to Ren & Stimpy. |ReleaseDateType=Full |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/2D, Concepts/Side Scrolling, Concepts/Search Action |Developers=Companies/Odd Men in Studios |Genres=Genres/Platformer |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Odd Men in Studios }}
